LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneratorQuestChain.description: This quest chain will have you explore the various sites in which {InventorFullName} tried to construct a prototype of the ultimate power source. If you connect the dots, you may be able to pick up this endeavour and construct your own ARC generator.
LanguageData.VQE_TheGeneratorQuestChain.label: the generator
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeQuestChain.description: This quest chain will have you travel to the arctic regions to find the location of a legendary cryptoforge - an ancient space ship with a workshop capable of developing the cryptogear. Given enough time and skill, you may be able to craft the legendary ultratech gear of the nomadic space warriors.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoforgeQuestChain.label: the cryptoforge
LanguageData.VQE_DeadlifeQuestChain.description: This quest will let you crack open and loot several underground silos left by an ancient civilization. As you scavenge the dark, ominous corridors, you’re bound to find out who [General_FullName] was and what was the purpose of the Operation: Deadlife.
LanguageData.VQE_DeadlifeQuestChain.label: operation: deadlife
